title: Cuban Pete
writer: Robert Presnell Sr., M. Coates Webster, Bernard Feins
actors: Desi Arnaz, Ethel Smith, Joan Shawlee
plot: Unable to complete the deal by telephone, advertising executive Roberts sends his assistant Ann to Cuba to lure a Cuban band, led by Desi Arnaz, on to an American radio program. Attracted to Ann, Arnaz and his band come to New Yor...
